## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior.

## Validation

- [ ] PHP syntax checks pass.
- [ ] Relevant offline tests pass.
- [ ] No credentials, documents, logs, dumps, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Evidence lineage and source literalness are preserved.
- [ ] Documentation and configuration examples are updated when needed.

## Operational impact

Describe database, configuration, API, security, privacy, or provider impact.
